text:
There updated shar file, this should be complete. Tested before submit

patches have been converted to sed scripts in the Makefile. This has 
been tested on a 7.2-RELEASE tinderbox.

log file to the tinderbox build can be found here:
http://projects.officialunix.com/logs/smasher-1.0.5.log


Chris
